an7.25:1.1:
1
"Bhikkhus, I will teach you seven principles of non-decline. Listen and attend closely. I will speak."
an7.25:1.2: "Yes, Bhante," those bhikkhus replied. The Blessed One said this:
an7.25:1.3: "And what, bhikkhus, are the seven principles of non-decline?
an7.25:1.4: (1) "As long as the bhikkhus are endowed with faith, only growth is to be expected for them, not decline.
an7.25:1.5:
2
(2) As long as they have a sense of moral shame … (3) … have moral dread … (4) … are learned … (5) … are energetic … (6) … are mindful … (7) … are wise, only growth is to be expected for them, not decline.
